summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for requested pre-sales updates on public URL. All requested feature checks passed: dual header logos, board title, lead edit/save, custom field attributes and values, date filtering impact, and kanban/list + stage-tab regression.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested scope.
Optional: clean hydration warning caused by span injection inside option elements in pre-sales lead select rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: Runtime console warning persists: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' causing hydration warning noise; likely from instrumentation/render path around select option children in CRMPage lead selector.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER13* leads via /api/v3/leads/manual during backend/frontend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://lead-manager-100.preview.emergentagent.com using presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123. Date filter test used 2099-01-01 to 2099-01-02 and reduced editable lead options from 24 to 0. Lead edit + custom extra_fields persisted and reloaded from backend. Screenshots captured in /app/test_reports/ with iteration13 prefix.
rca of the issue: No blocking feature defect reproduced. Non-blocking hydration warning RCA: option children appear to include a span wrapper at runtime, which is invalid HTML and triggers warning, though flow remains functional.
mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs used in this run; tested against live public endpoints.
